---
uiao_id: UIAO_CANON_DASHBOARD
title: "Corpus Status Dashboard"
status: DRAFT
owner: Governance Board
date: 2026-05-07
---

# Corpus Status Dashboard

> **Curated snapshot, refreshed at major ADR/doc landings.** ADR counts mirror
> [`src/uiao/canon/adr/index.md`](../../../src/uiao/canon/adr/index.md) (the
> source of truth). The doc-by-section catalog below is hand-curated and
> tracks canon-level documents only — not every file in the docs tree.
> A JSON sidecar at `docs/_data/corpus-index.json` is generated by
> [`docs/scripts/update_corpus_index.js`](../../../docs/scripts/update_corpus_index.js)
> for tooling consumers; that index scans every `.md` and `.qmd` file with a
> `uiao_id` frontmatter field and is independent of the curated tables here.

## Health Summary

Counts below describe the curated catalog enumerated in
[Document Status by Section](#document-status-by-section), not every file in
the docs tree. The full file inventory is much larger; this catalog tracks
canon-level documents that the Governance Board has agreed to keep
synchronized.

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Catalog documents | 38 |
| Status: Current | 22 |
| Status: Draft | 16 |
| Status: Needs Replacing | 0 |
| Status: Needs Creating | 0 |
| Status: Deprecated | 0 |
| ADRs (ACCEPTED) | 48 |
| ADRs (PROPOSED) | 7 |
| ADRs (DRAFT) | 2 |
| CI validation | Active |

> **Scope:** Counts above reflect the curated UIAO_X_NN catalog enumerated in the
> per-section tables below. Other `qmd`/`md` artifacts under `docs/docs/`
> (governance tooling, diagrams, RFCs, meta) exist outside this catalog and are
> not enumerated here. The `uiao_id` frontmatter field is not yet present on
> most catalogued docs; the IDs below are hand-curated until
> `scripts/update_corpus_index.js` and `docs/_data/corpus-index.json` ship.

## Document Status by Section

### Canon Overview

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_A_01 | Canonical Rules | Current |
| UIAO_A_02 | Glossary | Current |
| UIAO_A_03 | Migration Plan | Draft |
| UIAO_A_04 | PDF Layout Spec | Draft |

### Adapter Plane

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_B_01 | Adapter Contract | Current |
| UIAO_B_02 | Adapter Framework | Current |
| UIAO_B_03 | Adapter Responsibilities Diagram Set | Draft |
| UIAO_B_04 | Database Adapters | Current |
| UIAO_B_05 | Database Adapter Drift Detection | Draft |
| UIAO_B_06 | Database Adapter Onboarding Checklist | Draft |
| UIAO_B_07 | Canonical Definition of a UIAO Adapter | Current |

### Identity Plane

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_C_01 | Identity Plane Deep Dive | Current |
| UIAO_C_02 | Zero Trust Narrative | Current |

### Architecture

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_D_01 | Unified Architecture | Current |
| UIAO_D_02 | Control Plane Architecture | Current |
| UIAO_D_03 | Seven Layer Model | Current |
| UIAO_D_04 | System Architecture | Draft |
| UIAO_D_05 | Authorization Boundary | Draft |

### FedRAMP / Compliance

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_E_01 | FedRAMP 2.0x Crosswalk | Current |
| UIAO_E_02 | FedRAMP 2.0x Phase 2 Summary | Current |
| UIAO_E_03 | FedRAMP SSP Narrative (Full) | Current |
| UIAO_E_04 | Compliance Readiness | Draft |
| UIAO_E_05 | Crosswalk Index | Current |

### Evidence and Drift

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_F_01 | Drift Detection Standard | Current |
| UIAO_F_02 | Telemetry Plane Deep Dive | Current |
| UIAO_F_03 | Telemetry Evidence Map | Draft |
| UIAO_F_04 | Reconciliation Model | Draft |

### Management and Operations

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_G_01 | Management Stack | Current |
| UIAO_G_02 | Operational Handover | Draft |
| UIAO_G_03 | Modernization Timeline | Current |
| UIAO_G_04 | MVP Roadmap | Draft |

### Program Vision and Leadership

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_H_01 | Program Vision | Current |
| UIAO_H_02 | Leadership Briefing | Current |
| UIAO_H_03 | Executive Summary | Current |
| UIAO_H_04 | AI Security Principles | Draft |

### Onboarding and Contributing

| ID | Title | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| UIAO_I_01 | Contributing Guide | Draft |
| UIAO_I_02 | SCuBA Maintainer Onboarding | Draft |
| UIAO_I_03 | SCuBA Pipeline Runbook | Draft |

## ADR Status

Mirrors [`src/uiao/canon/adr/index.md`](../../../src/uiao/canon/adr/index.md).

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| ADR-000 | ADR Process and Lifecycle | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-005 | Canonical Claim Schema | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-006 | Evidence Determinism | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-007 | Multi-Cloud Adapter Model | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-008 | Zero-Trust Identity Anchoring | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-009 | Drift Ledger Immutability | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-010 | Vendor Baseline Versioning | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-011 | Multi-Adapter Correlation | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-012 | Canonical Drift Taxonomy | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-013 | Adapter Failure Isolation | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-014 | Evidence Severity Model | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-015 | Adapter Extensibility | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-016 | Evidence Bundle Lifecycle | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-017 | Adapter Sandbox Execution | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-018 | Mission Channel Enforcement | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-019 | Vendor Failure Containment | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-020 | Evidence Correlation Determinism | PROPOSED |
| ADR-021 | Adapter Hot-Swap and Rollback | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-022 | Evidence Compression | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-023 | Adapter Concurrency | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-024 | Evidence Diffing | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-025 | Adapter Health and Liveness | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-026 | Evidence Lifecycle Guarantees | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-027 | Adapter Retirement | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-028 | Monorepo Consolidation and GOS Integration | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-029 | Substrate v1 Ready for Release | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-030 | Pre-UIAO Terminology Reconciliation | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-031 | Python Package uiao_impl → uiao.impl (PEP 420 Namespace) | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-032 | Single-Package Consolidation — flatten src/uiao/ | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-033 | GCC Boundary Drift Class and Compensating Controls Architecture | PROPOSED |
| ADR-034 | Three-Plane Device Model and OrgPath Plane-Aware Architecture | PROPOSED |
| ADR-035 | OrgPath Codebook — Executable Canon Binding | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-036 | Dynamic Group Library — Executable Canon + Entra Provisioning Adapter | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-037 | Delegation Matrix — Executable Canon + Entra AU/Role Provisioning Adapter | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-038 | Device-Plane OrgPath Provisioning — Graph + ARM Dual-Transport Adapter | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-039 | OrgTree Policy Targeting — Intune + Azure Policy Dual Transport | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-040 | OrgTree Drift Detection Engine — Six-Phase Orchestrator | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-041 | UIAO Git Infrastructure — Self-Hosted Git on Windows Server 2025 + IIS | DRAFT |
| ADR-042 | AD Computer Conversion Guide — Canonical Input to Phase 4 Device Planes | DRAFT |
| ADR-043 | FedRAMP RFC-0026 (CA-7 Continuous Monitoring Expectations) — UIAO Integration | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-044 | Substrate Governance Realignment to Post-ADR-032 Single Package | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-045 | Scan Artifact Redaction Policy for Multi-Agency Distribution | PROPOSED |
| ADR-046 | CLI Surface Convention: Sub-App-per-Domain | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-047a | Continuous Monitoring Program and Customer Documentation Platform Architecture | PROPOSED |
| ADR-047b | FedRAMP 20x Integration — KSI emission and Minimum Assessment Scope adoption | PROPOSED |
| ADR-048 | OrgPath Attribute Selection — extensionAttributes over Custom Security Attributes | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-049 | Microsoft Modernization Adapter Coverage Expansion | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-050 | D3.1 Reference Middleware — Runtime, Language, Packaging, and Test Choices | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-051 | SAML as a Third Trust-Anchor Type for Application Identity | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-052 | PIV / USAccess Conformance Adapter — Federal Personnel Trust-Anchor Authority | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-053 | OPM Azure APIM Integration Adapter — Centralized Federal API Gateway Authority | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-054 | Single-ATO Reciprocity Model — Multi-Tenant Authorization Boundary | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-055 | Customer Identity Canon Block — KYC Protocol & Reciprocal Attribute Exchange | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-056 | Login.gov Federation Service — Activation Contract (Stage 2) | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-057 | ThousandEyes — Networks-Pillar Conditional Adoption Under GCC-Moderate | PROPOSED |
| ADR-058 | Microsoft Purview Conformance Adapter Coverage — Audit, DLP, Information Protection, Insider Risk | ACCEPTED |
| ADR-059 | SailPoint NERM Adapter — Boundary-Exception Carve-Out and Slot Allocation | ACCEPTED |

> **Known frontmatter inconsistencies** (see ADR index for details): ADR-033
> declares `id: ADR-030`; ADR-034 declares `id: ADR-031`; ADR-047 has two
> files (047a / 047b).

## Cross-Fabric Map

![Cross-Fabric Map](../images/cross-fabric-map.svg)

## See Also

- [Canon Overview](index.qmd)
- [ADR Index](../adr/index.qmd)
- [Document Library](../documents/index.qmd)

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
